original_hypothesis.title: Admin Can Bypass Founder Maturity Lock via setMatureAt
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: AgentVeToken.setMatureAt allows ADMIN_ROLE holders on agentNft to set matureAt to any value including 0 (past timestamp). This bypasses the founder's initial lock, allowing immediate withdrawal of initialLock LP tokens. The intended 10-year lock provides security for stakers, but admin can eliminate it instantly.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The matureAt value has no monotonicity enforcement. Admin can reduce it to 0, enabling immediate founder withdrawal. Combined with founder rug-pulling LP, this destroys token price.
original_hypothesis.config_evidence: v2/deployMigrator.ts grants ADMIN_ROLE to migrator contract; ADMIN_ROLE holders can call setMatureAt

proof_of_signal.pattern: setMatureAt(uint256 _matureAt) sets matureAt to any value; no check _matureAt >= existing matureAt

preconditions: Admin (ADMIN_ROLE on agentNft) colludes with founder
Founder has initialLock balance in veToken
matureAt is set to a past timestamp (e.g., 0)

initial_economic_evidence.suspicious_calculation: setMatureAt(0) → block.timestamp >= 0 is always true → founder can withdraw initialLock immediately
initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Admin calls setMatureAt(0), founder calls withdraw(initialLock)
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: Founder dumps LP tokens, crashing agent token price; captures LP value

economic_questions: How much LP is typically locked as initialLock?
What is the impact on token price of full LP removal?
Is there additional governance protection against this?
validation_requirements: Confirm setMatureAt has no lower bound
Verify LP removal impact on pool

market_conditions_analysis.optimal_timing: When token has accumulated significant value

potential_victim_impact.direct_victims: All veToken stakers and token holders
potential_victim_impact.estimated_impact_per_user: Significant loss from token price crash
potential_victim_impact.total_value_at_risk: Entire LP pool value and token market cap

investigation_priorities.calculation_validation: Test setMatureAt with value < current matureAt

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
